inputs:
  - resolved.address: operator
    resolved.coin: 100_001.000000 ADA
outputs:
  - address: operator
    coin: 0.825000 ADA
proposalProcedures:
  - ProposalProcedure:
      deposit: 100_000.000000 ADA
      returnAddr: operator
      action:
        TreasuryWithdrawals:
          withdrawals:
            cardano-foundation.ops: 50_000.000000 ADA
fee: 0.175000 ADA
